title: Tomes of Experience
description: Tomes used to store and retrieve experience points.
body:
Adds six different tomes that can store experience points - and give them back to the player.

![Tomes of Experience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/067a91e43cd8a2b3389de6a33153234845118097.png)

The tomes are craftable in-game and have configurable attributes. They follow the following hierarchy:

- Tome of Minor Experience
- Tome of Lesser Experience
- Tome of Experience
- Tome of Greater Experience
- Tome of Superior Experience
- Tome of Major Experience

Tomes are intended to be used while being held in the player's main hand.

- Sneak (Shift) + Use (Right-click) to transfer experience points to the tome the player is holding
- Use (Right-click) to transfer experience points from a tome to the player holding it

Refer to the [wiki](https://github.com/hanskroner/tomes-of-experience/wiki) for information on the different tomes, their crafting recipes, and how to adjust their configuration.
